signInSubtitle: Use your email and password to access this instance.
signUpSubtitle: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

cliAuth.cliCanFinish: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cliAuth.startAgain: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cliAuth.signInAndReturn: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cliAuth.cliRequestingAccess: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cliAuth.failedToUpdateChallenge: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
cliAuth.requiresInstanceAdmin: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

boardClaim.instanceLinked: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
boardClaim.signInToClaimBoard: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.claimDescription: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

invite.inviteMayBeExpired: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.firstAdminConfigured: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.
invite.requestPendingApproval: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.
invite.signInBeforeSubmitting: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
